# Andi Shehu, PhD

Official profile and service overview for Andi Shehu, PhD.

## Summary
- Founder and Applied AI Principal at Byteflows.
- LLM and AI Systems Architect focused on production reliability, evaluation, and business outcomes.
- Advisor to NYU on applied AI.
- Based in New York, NY.

## Primary URL
- https://andishehu.byteflows.com/

## Professional Profile
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/andi-shehu/

## Contact
- Email: ashehu@byteflows.com

## Focus Areas
- LLM system architecture
- Applied machine learning
- AI strategy and implementation
- Retrieval and enterprise search
- Evaluation, governance, and model quality
